center.name: 衛吉島
center.summary: 衛吉島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括花紋鴨、冠塚雉、Beautiful fruit dove，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The beautiful fruit dove is distributed in rainforests of New Guinea and the islands of Batanta, Waigeo, Salawati and Misool in West Papua, Indonesia, primarily in flat terrain.{{Cite journal |last=Diamond |first=Jared |last2=Bishop |first2=K

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Waigeo brushturkey inhabits mountain forests on Waigeo Island of West Papua

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Salvadori's teal is endemic to New Guinea; although the type specimen was reportedly collected on the Indonesian island of Waigeo, there is some doubt over the veracity of that claim, as the species is not now found there. Resident at elevations ranging from , Salvadori's teal prefers swiftly flowing rivers and streams, though it is also occasionally found in stagnant lakes
